title: Match Tnufa reading skills
subtitle: Match each reading skill to its description (Track B-C · Tnufa prep)

items.left: Finding answers directly written in the text
Understanding what the text suggests but doesn't say explicitly
Connecting information from 2 or more paragraphs/sources
Applying the text's idea to a new situation or imagining alternatives
Evaluating the text — judging the author's view, bias, or argument quality
